home.subtitle: Astrologer & Spiritual Guide
home.description: Renowned Vedic astrologer and spiritual guide specializing in Kundali analysis, predictions, Vastu consultation, sacred rituals, and Karmakanda based in Biratnagar, Nepal.
home.kundaliDesc: Detailed horoscope analysis and life guidance based on Vedic astrology principles.
home.vastuDesc: Expert advice on home and office vastu for harmony and prosperity.
home.ritualDesc: Guidance for shraddha, puja, and other important religious ceremonies.
home.calendarDesc: View my Nepali calendar to check available appointment slots and see scheduled bookings. Find the most auspicious time for your consultation.
home.contactDesc: Contact me for appointments, inquiries, or spiritual guidance. Begin your journey toward clarity and enlightenment.

about.title: About Guru Shaligram Dahal
about.subtitle: Astrologer & Spiritual Guide
about.intro: Shaligram Dahal is a renowned astrologer and spiritual guide based in Biratnagar, Nepal. With years of experience in Vedic astrology, vastu shastra, and ritual ceremonies, he has helped countless individuals find clarity, peace, and prosperity in their lives.
about.expertise: Specializing in Kundali (horoscope) analysis, vastu consultation, and guidance for important religious ceremonies like shraddha and puja, Guru Shaligram combines ancient wisdom with practical guidance to help his clients navigate life's challenges.
about.services: Whether you're seeking marriage compatibility analysis, muhurat (auspicious timing) for important events, or general spiritual guidance, Guru Shaligram provides personalized consultations based on traditional Vedic principles.
about.experienceValue: Years of dedicated practice in Vedic astrology and spiritual guidance

services.title: Services
services.description: Comprehensive astrological and spiritual services to guide you on your life's journey. Ancient wisdom meets modern understanding.
services.kundaliDesc: Detailed analysis of your birth chart (Kundali) to provide insights into your personality, life path, and future events. Includes predictions for marriage, foreign travel, health/disease, business, brat ceremonies, pasni, narayan, and other generic predictions.
services.vastuDesc: Expert guidance on vastu principles for your home, office, or business premises. Ensure harmony and prosperity through proper spatial arrangement.
services.shraddhaDesc: Complete guidance for shraddha ceremonies and other important rituals. Learn proper procedures, timings, and significance.
services.pujaDesc: Guidance for various pujas and religious ceremonies. Learn which pujas to perform for specific needs and how to conduct them properly.
services.muhuratDesc: Find the most auspicious dates (muhurat) for marriage, griha pravesh, business startup, and other important life events.
services.generalDesc: Create your personalized birth chart based on your birth date and time.
services.gunaMilanDesc: Kundali matching based on 36 gunas for marriage. Detailed analysis of Ashtakoot, Nadi, Rashi, Gana, Tara, Vashya, Yoni, and other compatibility factors.
services.brataPuranTitle: Brata Udhyapan, Brata Pratishtha & Puran Path
services.brataPuranDesc: Special guidance and services for Brata Udhyapan, Brata Pratishtha, Garud Puran, Chandi Path, Bhagawat Path, and Gita Path ceremonies.
services.shantiPujaTitle: Shanti Puja - Moola Janit, Ashubha Nakshatra, Mangalika Yoga
services.shantiPujaDesc: Special Shanti Puja and guidance for Moola Janit Dosha, Ashubha Nakshatra Janma Shanti, Mangalika Yoga Shanti, and Ark Vivah / Kumbh Vivah.

footer.title: Astrologer & Spiritual Guide
footer.blessing: May the stars illuminate your path
